creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Agreed with you. And would recommend the following :
1. Depreciate net-mgmt/argus-monitor
2. Repocopy net-mgmt/argus3-clients to net-mgmt/argus-clients and
depreciate net-mgmt/argus3-clients
3. Repocopy net-mgmt/argus3 to net-mgmt/argus and depreciate net-mgmt/argus3

Looking forward for committer's advice.

Regards,
Muhammad


On Sat, Jan 5, 2013 at 2:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net-mgmt/argus,
>
> Please note that PR ports/174991 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174991
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
